---
description: How to create slides for a seminar unit
---

# Create Slides

1. Create a new file in `slides/` named `unit<NN>_main.tex`
2. Use the `extarticle` landscape template:
   - Document class: `\documentclass[a4paper,landscape,12pt]{extarticle}`
   - Margins: `left=0.5in, right=0.5in, top=0.4in, bottom=0.55in`
   - `\slideheader{Title}{Subtitle}` macro with `cpp_logo.png`
   - Page numbers via `fancyhdr`
   - All content inside `\begin{huge}...\end{huge}`
   - `\newpage` between slides
3. Author: Set to your name (e.g., Jacky Li)
4. Include: Title slide, Outline, Theory, Problem, Implementation (code listings), Results (figures), Comparison, Conclusion
5. Reference template: `slides/unit02_main.tex`
6. Ensure all `.png` figures are generated by running the unit test first
